Simpson Nuveen Quarterly Report

Standard Operating Procedure  ·  Submitted to Krystal (CC: Mary)

References

Property Unit Address Sheet Nuveen Sites Master Sheet
Part 1: Fix Buildings for Partner in PG Admin
STEP 1 Head to PG Admin. Under Properties in the left sidebar, click "Building Management".
STEP 2 In the upper right corner of Building Management, click "More".
STEP 3 From the dropdown menu, click "Fix Buildings for Partner".
STEP 4 In the "Fix Buildings for Partner" modal, search "Simp" and select "Simpson Housing" (75 buildings).
STEP 5 Click "Start Scanning" in the bottom right of the modal.
STEP 6 In the "Review Matches" modal, check the Confidence level for each matched unit address. Look for 100% HIGH before proceeding.
STEP 7 Check the box next to the unit address, then click "+ Attach and Next" to confirm the match and move to the next building.
Part 2: Handling Low Confidence Matches
STEP 8 If the confidence level is 55% or below — VERY LOW, do not attach. Cross-reference using the Property Unit Address Sheet.
STEP 9 In the Property Unit Address Sheet, press Ctrl + H to open Find and Replace, then search for the property name (e.g. "Skyhouse Nashville").
STEP 10 Go back to PG Admin and copy the unit address shown in the Review Matches modal (e.g. "1009 8th Ave S, Nashville, TN, 37203").
STEP 11 Back in the Property Unit Address Sheet, paste the unit address into the Find field, then change the Search dropdown to "This Sheet".
STEP 12 Click "Find" to search for the unit address within the sheet.
STEP 13 Check the result. If the sheet shows "There are no entries matching [address]", the unit is not in the sheet.
STEP 14 Back in PG Admin:
  • If the unit address was found → check the matching unit(s) and click "+ Attach and Next"
  • If the unit address was not found → click "Skip"
Part 3: Export Data from PG Admin
STEP 15 In Building Management, click "Filter", then select "Partner Organizations" from the field dropdown.
STEP 16 In the filter's "Select options" field, search "Simpson" and select "Simpson Housing".
STEP 17 Click "Add Filter" to apply the Simpson Housing filter.
STEP 18 Click "Add Filter" again, select "Ownership Company", then search and select "Nuveen".
STEP 19 In the upper right corner, click "View" to open the Toggle Columns panel.
STEP 20 In the Toggle Columns panel, uncheck everything and leave only these columns checked:
  • ✅ Name
  • ✅ TotalUnitCount
  • ✅ MoveInCount
  • ✅ BillUploadVerifiedCount
  • ✅ UtilityVerifiedCount
  • ✅ PendingSetupCount
STEP 21 Click "More" in the upper right corner.
STEP 22 From the dropdown, click "Export to Excel".
Part 4: Input Data into the Nuveen Sites Sheet
STEP 23 Open the Nuveen Sites Master Sheet.
STEP 24 Input the exported data per property into the following columns:
  • Move-In Count
  • Bill Upload Count
  • Utility Verified
  • Pending Count
Part 5: Prepare the Final Report File
STEP 25 Click "File" → "Make a Copy".
STEP 26 In the "Copy document" dialog, change the save location from "Implementation" (shared PMC folder) to your personal Google Drive, then click "Make a copy".
STEP 27 The copied file will automatically open in a new tab.
STEP 28 Right-click the "Property List" tab and select "Delete", then do the same for "Property Summary" — leaving only the "Nuveen Quarterly Report" sheet.
STEP 29 Only the "Nuveen Quarterly Report" tab should remain.
STEP 30 Delete the following columns:
  • Move-In Count
  • Bill Upload Count
  • Utility Verified
  • Pending Count
STEP 31 The final sheet should only show: Property Name, Total Unit Count, Total Residents, Penetration — with a TOTAL row at the bottom and only 1 tab.
STEP 32 Fill in the Report Date field at the top of the sheet with the date the data was compiled (e.g. 5/28/2026).
STEP 33 Rename the sheet tab to include the month and day (e.g. "Nuveen Quarterly Report [5/26]").
STEP 34 Click "File" → "Download" → "Microsoft Excel (.xlsx)".
Part 6: Send the Report
STEP 35 Send an email to Krystal with Mary CC'd, attaching the downloaded Excel file.
  • Use template below unless Mary suggests changes to the wording

To: Krystal

CC: Mary

Subject: Simpson Nuveen Quarterly Report

Hi Krystal,

Attached is the quarterly report for the Nuveen sites. This summary is through Report Date.

Please let me know if you have any questions.

Best,

Jeric
